title: SQLancer crash on coalesce
poc: select coalesce(1 = true, t0.c0 > 0) from t0;
key_bug_features: coalesce function with boolean and numeric comparison
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE "sys"."t1" ("c1" INTEGER NOT NULL, "c2" BOOLEAN DEFAULT false);
INSERT INTO "sys"."t1" ("c1", "c2") VALUES (5, true), (10, false), (15, NULL);
SELECT coalesce(t1.c2, t2.c3 > 1.00) FROM "sys"."t1" JOIN "sys"."t2" ON t1.c1 = 10;
